steps.title: Graph each answer choice
steps.content: Exactly one distinct real solution means the graph touches the x-axis exactly once. In Desmos, graph the left side of each equation and look for the parabola that is tangent to the x-axis.

steps.title: Identify the tangent graph
steps.content: Choice A crosses the x-axis twice, choice B never reaches the x-axis, and choice C crosses twice. Choice D is $y=x^2-16x+64=(x-8)^2$, which touches the x-axis once at $x=8$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Because $(x-8)^2=0$ has exactly one solution, $x=8$, choice D is correct.
